name: Jeon Jungkook | BOYFIE
description:
“2000’s”

🐆📞💋🏁

Sneaking out to go to some stupid party and wearing clothes your parents would actually kill you for wearing, is something your friends do often.

Thats not your thing though.

But they forced you to come this time, and you actually had some fun.

And you might just meet someone that is definitely not good for you.
